title: Mailchimp vs Flodesk (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Mailchimp and Flodesk email marketing tools. See pricing, features, ratings, and which platform suits your needs best.
h1: Mailchimp vs Flodesk: Complete Comparison for 2025
intro: Mailchimp and Flodesk are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. Mailchimp excels as an affordable, feature-rich option for beginners and growing businesses, while Flodesk targets visual creators with beautiful design templates and unlimited subscriber scaling. This guide compares their pricing, features, and performance to help you choose the right platform.

comparison_table.tool_a: Automation, segmentation, A/B testing, landing pages
comparison_table.tool_b: Stunning templates, unlimited subscribers, checkout forms, link in bio

choose_a_if: You're just starting out and want to test email marketing for free
You need advanced automation, A/B testing, and audience segmentation
You want an affordable option with a clear entry point for paid plans
choose_b_if: You prioritize beautiful, design-focused email templates
You want unlimited subscribers included in a flat monthly fee
You're a visual brand, photographer, or designer who values aesthetics

faq.a: It depends on your needs. Mailchimp is better for beginners and those needing advanced automation features at a lower cost, while Flodesk excels for visually-driven brands and offers superior customer satisfaction ratings. Flodesk scores higher on G2 (4.8 vs 4.3) and Trustpilot (4.7 vs 1.5), suggesting better overall user experience.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or Flodesk?
faq.a: Mailchimp is significantly cheaper upfront, offering a free plan for up to 500 subscribers and paid plans starting at $13/month. Flodesk starts at $38/month with no free tier, but includes unlimited subscribers from day one, making it more cost-effective for larger lists.

faq.q: Can I switch from Flodesk to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your subscriber lists and email data. The migration process typically involves exporting contacts as CSV files from Flodesk and importing them into Mailchimp. Check both platforms' documentation for specific steps and any potential formatting adjustments needed.
